configEntries.description: npm executable used for global package checks and upgrades.

scripts.name: Check npm Global Updates
scripts.description: Checks globally installed npm packages and emits stable dashboard parser lines.

steps.label: Check npm global updates
steps.command:
npm_cmd="{{config.npmCommand}}"
[ -n "$npm_cmd" ] || npm_cmd=npm
out="$($npm_cmd outdated -g --json 2>/dev/null || true)"
printf '%s' "$out" | node -e 'let s=``;process.stdin.on(`data`,d=>s+=d);process.stdin.on(`end`,()=>{if(!s.trim())return;const o=JSON.parse(s);for(const n of Object.keys(o)){const p=o[n]||{};if(p.current&&p.latest&&p.current!==p.latest)console.log(`LUDASH_UPDATE ${n} ${p.current} ${p.latest}`)}})'

scripts.name: List Installed npm Global Packages
scripts.description: Reports globally installed npm packages for package inventory.

steps.label: List npm global packages
steps.command:
npm_cmd="{{config.npmCommand}}"
[ -n "$npm_cmd" ] || npm_cmd=npm
out="$($npm_cmd ls -g --depth=0 --json 2>/dev/null || true)"
printf '%s' "$out" | node -e 'let s=``;process.stdin.on(`data`,d=>s+=d);process.stdin.on(`end`,()=>{if(!s.trim())return;const o=JSON.parse(s);const deps=o.dependencies||{};for(const n of Object.keys(deps)){const v=deps[n]&&deps[n].version;if(v)console.log(`LUDASH_PACKAGE ${n} ${v}`)}})'

scripts.name: Update Selected npm Global Packages
scripts.description: Installs the selected global npm packages at their latest matching versions.
